/config.description: Choose a Share for Bazarr configuration. Eg: create a Share called bazarr-config for this purpose alone.
/config.label: Config Storage

/movies.description: Choose a Share where Radarr stores movies. Eg: create a Share called movies for this purpose alone.
/movies.label: Movie Storage

/tv.description: Choose a Share where Sonarr stores TV shows. Eg: create a Share called tv for this purpose alone.
/tv.label: TV Show Storage

PUID.description: Enter a valid UID to run Bazarr as. It must have full permissions to all Shares mapped in the previous step.
PUID.label: UID to run Bazarr as.

PGID.description: Enter a valid GID to use along with the above UID. It(or the above UID) must have full permissions to all Shares mapped in the previous step.
PGID.label: GID to run Bazarr as.

Bazarr.description:
Bazarr is a companion application to Sonarr and Radarr that manages and downloads subtitles based on your requirements.

Based on a custom docker image: https://hub.docker.com/r/linuxserver/bazarr, available for amd64 and arm64 architecture.
